raw_answers:
Q001:Character types: The password must contain at least one uppercase letter, one lowercase letter, one numeric digit, and one special character (e.g., @, #, $, %, ^, &, *). Restrictions: Consecutive spaces are forbidden. The password cannot contain the user's explicit email prefix or username to mitigate easy guessing.
Q002: Email format must contain @ and domain
Q003: meaningful inline error
Q004: The system will send a unique verification link via email immediately after registration. This link is valid for 24 hours. Users can request a resend of the code every 60 seconds.
Q005: First name, Last name, email, phone, password, confirm password

answers.Q001: Character types: The password must contain at least one uppercase letter, one lowercase letter, one numeric digit, and one special character (e.g., @, #, $, %, ^, &, *). Restrictions: Consecutive spaces are forbidden. The password cannot contain the user's explicit email prefix or username to mitigate easy guessing.
answers.Q002: Email format must contain @ and domain
answers.Q004: The system will send a unique verification link via email immediately after registration. This link is valid for 24 hours. Users can request a resend of the code every 60 seconds.
answers.Q005: First name, Last name, email, phone, password, confirm password

answered_clarifications.question: What are the password complexity requirements (e.g., must include uppercase, lowercase, digit, special character)?
answered_clarifications.reason: Missing complexity rules affect security and test coverage for valid/invalid passwords.
answered_clarifications.answer: Character types: The password must contain at least one uppercase letter, one lowercase letter, one numeric digit, and one special character (e.g., @, #, $, %, ^, &, *). Restrictions: Consecutive spaces are forbidden. The password cannot contain the user's explicit email prefix or username to mitigate easy guessing.

answered_clarifications.question: What is the exact email format validation rule (e.g., must contain '@' and a domain, allowed characters)?
answered_clarifications.reason: Email format validation is critical for positive and negative test cases.
answered_clarifications.answer: Email format must contain @ and domain

answered_clarifications.question: What error messages should be displayed for duplicate email, invalid password length, or invalid email format?
answered_clarifications.reason: Error handling affects user experience and test validation of system responses.

answered_clarifications.question: What is the email verification method (e.g., clickable link, one-time code) and what is the expiration time for the verification token?
answered_clarifications.reason: Verification method and token expiry impact test scenarios for successful and failed verification.
answered_clarifications.answer: The system will send a unique verification link via email immediately after registration. This link is valid for 24 hours. Users can request a resend of the code every 60 seconds.

answered_clarifications.question: What additional fields (e.g., name, phone) are required during account creation, and what are their validation rules?
answered_clarifications.reason: Missing fields affect test data preparation and account creation flow coverage.
answered_clarifications.answer: First name, Last name, email, phone, password, confirm password
